scripts.sync: rsync -a --delete --exclude='contact/' journal/_includes/ docs/_includes/ && rsync -a --delete journal/_layouts/ docs/_layouts/ && rsync -a --delete journal/_plugins/ docs/_plugins/ && rsync -a --delete journal/css/ docs/css/ && rsync -a --delete journal/js/ docs/js/ && rsync -a --delete journal/fonts/ docs/fonts/ && rsync -a --delete journal/img/ docs/img/
scripts.serve: npm run sync && cd docs && bundle exec jekyll serve --config ../journal/_config.yml,_config.yml
scripts.build: npm run sync && cd docs && bundle exec jekyll build --config ../journal/_config.yml,_config.yml --trace
scripts.prebuild: npm run stat-pieces && npm run stat-paragraphs && npm run stat-history
